description_short: Soft, warm, and made for colder nights, our 400 GSM Virgin Microfiber Winter Reversible Comforter is designed for cozy winter snuggles.

construction_layers.name: Fill
construction_layers.notes: Warm and cozy fill — heavier than all-season (200 GSM).

proprietary_tech.name: Reversible Design
proprietary_tech.description: Two-tone with different colour on each side.

faq_specs.question: What is the fill of the comforter?
faq_specs.answer: The comforter is filled with 400 GSM Virgin Microfiber.

faq_specs.question: What is the country of origin?
faq_specs.answer: The country of origin is India.
